faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Have a question? Find answers below.

questions.perfumeImage: What kind of image should I upload?
questions.perfumeImageAnswer:
Any photo that clearly shows the face of a person or character will work. Photoshoots, stage photos, selfies — any image can be analyzed.

For the most accurate analysis, use a high-resolution photo where the person or character appears alone.
questions.figureImage: What kind of image should I upload?
questions.figureImageAnswer:
When uploading an image for figure production, it's best to use an image that clearly shows the full body or upper body of the person or character.

We replicate the uploaded image as closely as possible, so please upload the image you'd like to be made into a figure.
questions.diffuserUsage: How do I use the diffuser?
questions.diffuserUsageAnswer: Simply spray the scent essence onto the sachet stones. If the scent is too faint, spray more essence.
questions.howToOrder: How do I place an order?
questions.howToOrderAnswer: Go to your desired program page, upload an image and run the analysis. If you're happy with the results, proceed to payment.
questions.whenShipAnswer: Orders are shipped within 2–3 days of the order date. If there are any delays, we will notify you in advance.

perfume.usageGuideSubtitle: Perfume tips to enjoy with your favorite
perfume.defaultGuide1: Spray on your wrists and dab behind your ears! Double the happiness when you think of your favorite while enjoying the scent!
perfume.defaultGuide2: Apply directly on skin rather than clothes! As your body heat releases the fragrance, you'll feel the warm charm of your favorite!
perfume.defaultGuide3: Don't rub — let it air dry! When the scent layers stay intact, your multifaceted charm unfolds over time!
perfume.defaultGuide1Emoji: Spray on your wrists and dab behind your ears! Double the happiness when you think of your favorite while enjoying the scent! 🌸✨
perfume.defaultGuide2Emoji: Apply directly on skin rather than clothes! As your body heat releases the fragrance, you'll feel the warm charm of your favorite! 💕
perfume.defaultGuide3Emoji: Don't rub — let it air dry! When the scent layers stay intact, your multifaceted charm unfolds over time! 🌈✨

metadata.defaultTitle: AC'SCENT IDENTITY - AI Custom Perfume Recommendation Service
metadata.defaultDescription: Discover your custom perfume with AI image analysis. AI Image Analysis Perfume, 3D Figure Diffuser, Graduation Memorial Perfume. Over 10,000 analyses completed with 95% satisfaction.
metadata.ogTitle: AC'SCENT IDENTITY - AI Custom Perfume Recommendation Service
metadata.ogDescription: Find your signature scent with image analysis. AI Perfume, 3D Figure Diffuser, Graduation Memorial Perfume.

brand.headline: Brand Story
brand.story1Desc: "What scent would you smell when you think of someone you love?" It all started with this simple question. AC'SCENT IDENTITY was born from the belief that fandom can be remembered not only through sight and sound, but also through smell.
brand.story2Desc: Perfume is no longer exclusive to a few. We believe everyone should be able to easily and joyfully find their own signature scent.
brand.story3Desc: We combine cutting-edge AI technology with perfume expertise to deliver personalized fragrance experiences.
brand.value1Desc: We find the fragrance made just for you, not one-size-fits-all recommendations.
brand.value2Desc: We make finding your perfume a fun and meaningful experience.
brand.value3Desc: We create a service anyone can start easily and without burden.
brand.ctaDesc: Start your special fragrance journey with AC'SCENT IDENTITY.

howItWorks.headline: How It Works
howItWorks.heroDesc: Introducing AC'SCENT IDENTITY's AI analysis system.
howItWorks.overviewDesc: Using cutting-edge AI technology, we analyze images and text simultaneously to create a perfume recipe just for you.
howItWorks.tech1Desc: Analyzes images and text simultaneously with the latest multimodal AI.
howItWorks.tech2Desc: Recognizes colors, mood, and expressions to identify visual characteristics.
howItWorks.tech3Desc: Creates custom recipes based on extensive perfume data.
howItWorks.tech4Desc: Finds the perfect perfume for you through trait-based optimal matching.
howItWorks.processSubtitle: Your custom perfume recommendation in 4 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Collects the user's image and selection information (style, personality, charm points). Images are automatically compressed and optimized to 800x960 size.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI analyzes the image with 70% priority. It identifies colors, mood, expressions, and overall visual tone, then combines it with 30% of user-selected information for comprehensive analysis.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Based on the analysis results, we create a perfume recipe just for you. Each perfume is defined by 10 traits (sexy, cute, charisma, etc.) and 6 scent categories (citrus, floral, woody, etc.).
howItWorks.step4Desc: We recommend the perfume with the highest match score, along with fun fandom-style descriptions. Users can adjust recommendations through feedback.
howItWorks.categoriesSubtitle: We'll find the fragrance that suits you
howItWorks.categoriesFooter: We analyze the characteristics of each category to create a perfume recipe that matches you.
howItWorks.privacyDesc: Uploaded images are securely processed after analysis and are not used for other purposes without user consent.
howItWorks.privacyCheck1: Images are used only for analysis purposes
howItWorks.privacyCheck2: Personal information is encrypted and securely stored
howItWorks.privacyCheck3: We do not share information with third parties
howItWorks.ctaDesc: Discover your signature perfume analyzed by AI.

collaboration.heroDesc:
Combining AI technology and scent expertise
to create special brand experiences.
collaboration.service1Desc: We develop customized scent recommendation programs using AI. We design and implement recommendation logic tailored to your brand, including image analysis and character narrative analysis.
collaboration.service2Desc: We expand the developed AI program into an offline pop-up store. We plan and operate spaces where visitors can receive scent recommendations and experience them firsthand.
collaboration.service3Desc: We produce perfume keyring cases designed to match your brand or IP characters. We flexibly handle everything from small-batch to mass production.

privacy.title:
AC'SCENT IDENTITY
Privacy Policy
privacy.article1Intro: AC'SCENT IDENTITY (hereinafter "Company") collects the following personal information to provide services.
privacy.article1RequiredItem1: Social login info: Name (nickname), profile image
privacy.article1AutoItem2: AI analysis results and recipe information
privacy.article2Intro: Collected personal information is used for the following purposes.
privacy.article2Item2Desc: AI image analysis, perfume recipe generation and storage
privacy.article2Item3Desc: Delivery and payment processing for purchased products
privacy.article3Intro: The Company will promptly destroy personal information once the purpose of collection and use has been fulfilled.
privacy.article3Item2Desc: Until membership withdrawal or deletion request
privacy.article3Item3Desc: Automatically deleted within 30 days after analysis
privacy.article3Note: However, information may be retained for the required period if preservation is necessary under applicable laws.
privacy.article4Intro: The Company will promptly destroy personal information when it is no longer needed, such as when the retention period has expired or the processing purpose has been achieved.
privacy.article4Item1: Electronic files: Permanently deleted using methods that prevent recovery
privacy.article5Intro: Users may exercise the following rights at any time.
privacy.article5Item2: Request to correct or delete personal information
privacy.article5Item3: Request to suspend processing of personal information
privacy.article5ContactDesc: You can delete information directly from My Page or request through Customer Service.
privacy.article6Intro: The Company takes the following measures to ensure the security of personal information.
privacy.article6Item1: Encrypted storage and transmission of personal information
privacy.article6Item2: Technical countermeasures against hacking and other threats
privacy.article6Item3: Restricted access to and management of personal information
privacy.supplementEffective: This Privacy Policy is effective from {date}.
privacy.supplementNotice: Any changes to the Privacy Policy will be announced through in-service notifications.

terms.title:
AC'SCENT IDENTITY
Terms of Service
terms.article1Desc: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using the AC'SCENT IDENTITY online service (hereinafter "Service") operated by NEANDER Co., Ltd. (hereinafter "Company"), as well as the rights, obligations, and responsibilities of the Company and users.
terms.article2Item1Desc: refers to all services provided by the Company, including AI image analysis-based custom perfume recommendations, perfume manufacturing and sales, figure diffuser manufacturing and sales, etc.
terms.article2Item2Desc: refers to members and non-members who use the Service provided by the Company in accordance with these Terms.
terms.article2Item3Desc: refers to a person who has registered as a member by providing personal information to the Company and accesses and uses the Service through social login (Google, Kakao).
terms.article2Item4Desc: refers to all products sold by the Company, including custom perfumes, figure diffusers, signature perfumes, etc.
terms.article3Item1: These Terms become effective when posted on the Service screen or notified to users by other means.
terms.article3Item2: The Company may amend these Terms within the scope not violating applicable laws, and will notify changes within the Service at least 7 days before the effective date.
terms.article3Item3: If a user does not agree with the amended Terms, they may discontinue using the Service and withdraw their membership. If the user continues to use the Service after the effective date of the amended Terms, they shall be deemed to have agreed to the changes.
terms.article4Intro: The Company provides the following services.
terms.article4Service1: Custom perfume recommendation service through AI image analysis
terms.article4Service3: 3D figure pot diffuser manufacturing and sales
terms.article4Service4: Graduation perfume, signature perfume, and other planned products
terms.article4Service5: Other services determined by the Company
terms.article4Note: The Company may change the content of the Service and will notify changes within the Service.
terms.article5Item1: Membership registration is done through social login (Google, Kakao) and is completed by providing required information and agreeing to these Terms.
terms.article5Item2: Members may request withdrawal at any time through My Page, and the Company will process the withdrawal immediately.
terms.article5Item3: Upon withdrawal, personal information will be handled in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
terms.article6Intro: Users shall not engage in the following activities.
terms.article6Item1: Using the Service by impersonating another person's information
terms.article6Item2: Infringing on the Company's intellectual property or third-party rights
terms.article6Item3: Interfering with the normal operation of the Service
terms.article6Item4: Collecting or storing other users' personal information
terms.article6Item5: Violating laws, public order, or good morals
terms.article6Item6: Unauthorized commercial use of the Service
terms.article7Desc1: If a user violates the obligations of these Terms or interferes with the normal operation of the Service, the Company may restrict service use through warnings, temporary suspension, or permanent suspension.
terms.article7Desc2: The Company will notify the user of the reason for any use restriction under the preceding paragraph.
terms.article8Item1: Users make a purchase request by selecting a product and proceeding with payment within the Service.
terms.article8Item2: A purchase contract is established when the Company sends an order confirmation notification for the user's purchase request.
terms.article8Item3: Product prices, shipping fees, etc. are based on the prices displayed in the Service at the time of order.
terms.article8Item4: The Company may reject a purchase request in the following cases.
terms.article8Reject1: If the request contains false, missing, or incorrect information
terms.article8Reject2: If the product cannot be provided due to insufficient stock
terms.article8Reject3: If there are other reasons that make it inappropriate to approve the purchase request
terms.article9Intro: Users may pay for products using the following payment methods provided by the Company.
terms.article9Note: For bank transfer (direct deposit) payments, the order may be automatically cancelled if payment is not confirmed within 3 days of the order date.
terms.article10Item1: Products are shipped within 2-3 business days after payment confirmation or completion.
terms.article10Item2: The base shipping fee is 3,000 KRW, with free shipping for orders totaling 50,000 KRW or more.
terms.article10Item3: Custom-made products (figure diffusers, etc.) may be delayed depending on the production period, and users will be notified in advance.
terms.article10Item4: Delivery delays caused by the user's absence, incorrect address, etc. are not the Company's responsibility.
terms.article11Intro: Details regarding cancellation, refund, and exchange of products can be found in the Cancellation/Refund/Exchange Policy.
terms.article11Note1: Pre-shipment cancellation: Cancel through My Page
terms.article11Note2: Custom-made products: Cannot be cancelled/refunded after production begins
terms.article11Note3: Product defects: Exchange/refund available within 7 days of receipt
terms.article12Item1: The Company will not engage in activities prohibited by applicable laws and these Terms or contrary to good morals, and will do its best to provide continuous and stable services.
terms.article12Item2: The Company will safely protect users' personal information and comply with the Privacy Policy.
terms.article12Item3: The Company will promptly handle users' complaints and opinions related to service use.
terms.article13Item1: The Company is exempt from liability if unable to provide services due to force majeure such as natural disasters, wars, or telecommunications service interruptions.
terms.article13Item2: The Company is not liable for service disruptions caused by the user's own fault.
terms.article13Item3: AI analysis results are for reference only, and product selection based on analysis results is at the user's discretion.
terms.article14Item1: Lawsuits regarding disputes between the Company and users shall be under the jurisdiction of the Seoul Central District Court.
terms.article14Item2: Disputes between the Company and users shall be resolved in accordance with applicable laws, including the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce.
terms.article14Item3: Users may apply for dispute mediation to relevant agencies such as the Fair Trade Commission or the Korea Consumer Agency.
terms.supplementEffective: These Terms of Service are effective from {date}.
terms.supplementNotice: Any changes to the Terms of Service will be announced through in-service notifications.

refund.title:
AC'SCENT IDENTITY
Cancellation/Refund/Exchange Policy
refund.cancelMethod1: My Page > Order History > Request Cancellation
refund.cancelMethod2: Request cancellation on My Page or contact Customer Service
refund.cancelMethod3: Custom-made products cannot be cancelled after production begins
refund.cancelNote1: ※ For bank transfer (direct deposit), if the order is cancelled before payment, the order is cancelled without a separate refund process.
refund.cancelNote2: ※ Bank transfer orders may be automatically cancelled if payment is not confirmed within 3 days of the order date.
refund.refundReason2: Product defects (damage, deterioration, wrong delivery, etc.)
refund.refundReason3: When the product significantly differs from its advertisement
refund.refundAmount2: If a coupon was used, the coupon will be reissued upon cancellation.
refund.refundAmount3: For refunds due to product defects, the Company covers return shipping costs.
refund.refundAmount4: For refunds due to change of mind, the user covers return shipping costs (3,000 KRW).
refund.exchangeCondition1: Exchange request within 7 days of receiving the product
refund.exchangeCondition3: Wrong product delivered (different from what was ordered)
refund.exchangeNotPossible1: Product damaged due to the user's fault
refund.exchangeNotPossible2: Product value decreased due to use or opening (perfume opened, diffuser used, etc.)
refund.exchangeNotPossible3: Change of mind for custom-made products (due to custom production nature)
refund.exchangeNotPossible4: Product can no longer be resold due to the passage of time
refund.exchangeNotPossible5: More than 7 days have passed since receipt
refund.exchangeProcess1: Submit exchange request to Customer Service (phone or email)
refund.exchangeProcess3: Return product to Company's designated address
refund.exchangeProcess4: Exchange product shipped after receiving and verifying returned product
refund.shippingPeriodValue: Shipped within 2-3 business days after payment confirmation
refund.shippingFeeValue: Base 3,000 KRW (Free shipping for orders over 50,000 KRW)
refund.returnFeeValue: Company covers for defects / User covers for change of mind (3,000 KRW)
refund.shippingNote: ※ Custom-made products (figure diffusers, etc.) may have delayed shipping depending on production time, with advance notice provided.
refund.article5Intro: For inquiries about cancellations, refunds, and exchanges, please contact Customer Service below.
refund.contactNote: ※ For email inquiries, please include your order number for faster processing.
refund.article6Title: Article 6 (Right of Withdrawal under E-Commerce Act)
refund.article6Desc1: Under the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, users may withdraw their subscription within 7 days from the date of receiving the product.
refund.article6Desc2: However, withdrawal may be restricted in the following cases.
refund.article6Limit1: Product is lost or damaged due to the user's fault
refund.article6Limit2: Product value has significantly decreased due to use or partial consumption
refund.article6Limit3: Products individually produced per order (custom perfumes, figure diffusers, etc.) where allowing withdrawal would cause irrecoverable significant damage to the seller
refund.article6Limit4: Packaging of reproducible products has been damaged
refund.supplementEffective: This Cancellation/Refund/Exchange Policy is effective from {date}.
refund.supplementNotice: Any changes to this policy will be announced through in-service notifications.

cookieConsent.message: This website uses cookies to improve your experience.
